creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 253100
libarcus

If you get this error, it means the post-extract phase is not properly executed and you are running the upstream, conan-based Makefile.

I did not test the makefile with non /usr/ports port directory, maybe I missed something here? Here's my directory.

Regarding conan, I tried at first to use it, and it it's a major pain. I suspect making a port from it would end in creating a single Cura fat package that would require a lot of scripting to pre-fetch the deps, a bit like what nodejs ports do.
